news.title:
Havells faces margin stress due to rising costs; cables segment impacted by raw material inflation.
RAC sales recovery slow; stock trades at 42x FY27 earnings, valuations lack comfort.
news.summary:
Havells faces margin stress due to rising costs; cables segment impacted by raw material inflation.
RAC sales recovery slow; stock trades at 42x FY27 earnings, valuations lack comfort.

news.title:
Heatwave drives shares of Blue Star, Voltas, Havells up 5% as AC demand rises.
Blue Star launched 125 AC models, including energy-efficient and antivirus tech ACs.
news.summary:
Heatwave drives shares of Blue Star, Voltas, Havells up 5% as AC demand rises.
Blue Star launched 125 AC models, including energy-efficient and antivirus tech ACs.

news.title:
Jindal Power, Vedanta, and Havells are among 22 bidders for Gupta Power.
Gupta Power faces 4,240 crore debtor claims and is undergoing proceedings.
news.summary:
Jindal Power, Vedanta, and Havells are among 22 bidders for Gupta Power.
Gupta Power faces 4,240 crore debtor claims and is undergoing proceedings.

news.title:
US tariffs have hurt Indian cable and telecom firms like Sterlite Tech, HFCL, Polycab, Havells, and RR Kabel, impacting margins and exports amid a US data centre boom.
Companies aim to mitigate tariffs by localizing production or diversifying markets; demand remains strong in the US for data centres and broadband infrastructure.
news.summary:
US tariffs have hurt Indian cable and telecom firms like Sterlite Tech, HFCL, Polycab, Havells, and RR Kabel, impacting margins and exports amid a US data centre boom.
Companies aim to mitigate tariffs by localizing production or diversifying markets; demand remains strong in the US for data centres and broadband infrastructure.

news.title:
Havells sees benefits from capacity expansion but faces challenges from rising copper costs, impacting short-term demand and margins.
Q3FY26 revenue rose 14.1% YoY to ₹5,573 crore; net profit grew 6.4% to ₹301 crore. Stock declined 16% over the past year.
news.summary:
Havells sees benefits from capacity expansion but faces challenges from rising copper costs, impacting short-term demand and margins.
Q3FY26 revenue rose 14.1% YoY to ₹5,573 crore; net profit grew 6.4% to ₹301 crore. Stock declined 16% over the past year.

news.title:
Havells India's shares drop 6% after Q3 results announcement.
Persistent Systems falls ahead of its earnings report.
news.summary:
Havells India's shares drop 6% after Q3 results announcement.
Persistent Systems falls ahead of its earnings report.

news.title: Goldman Sachs retains Buy rating on Havells India, revising target price to ₹1,880 from ₹1,730.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs retains Buy rating on Havells India, revising target price to ₹1,880 from ₹1,730.

news.title:
Havells plans cautious production for summer products like ACs, focusing on clearing inventory after weak season.
Solar segment margins range from early double digits to high single digits; optimistic future margin growth expected.
news.summary:
Havells plans cautious production for summer products like ACs, focusing on clearing inventory after weak season.
Solar segment margins range from early double digits to high single digits; optimistic future margin growth expected.

news.title:
Havells India anticipates slow demand recovery amid price and commodity challenges.
Plans Rs. 1,000 Cr capex in FY27 for cables, wires, and R&D center.
news.summary:
Havells India anticipates slow demand recovery amid price and commodity challenges.
Plans Rs. 1,000 Cr capex in FY27 for cables, wires, and R&D center.

news.title:
Havells India Ltd's quality grade downgraded from excellent to good due to mixed fundamentals.
While sales growth and returns on capital are strong, ROE and market performance have moderated.
news.summary:
Havells India Ltd's quality grade downgraded from excellent to good due to mixed fundamentals.
While sales growth and returns on capital are strong, ROE and market performance have moderated.

news.title:
Nifty 50 to remain unchanged in the March 2026 review, per Nuvama. Mid and small-cap indices to see significant reshuffles driven by IPOs and digital firms.
Tata Capital, ICICI Prudential AMC may enter Nifty Next 50, while Bajaj Housing Finance, Havells India face potential exclusion. Nifty Smallcap 250 sees deep transformation.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 to remain unchanged in the March 2026 review, per Nuvama. Mid and small-cap indices to see significant reshuffles driven by IPOs and digital firms.
Tata Capital, ICICI Prudential AMC may enter Nifty Next 50, while Bajaj Housing Finance, Havells India face potential exclusion. Nifty Smallcap 250 sees deep transformation.

news.title:
Havells India releases Q3 financials; announces Rs 4/share interim dividend.
Proposes new ESPS; records Rs 45.1 cr exceptional item from labor codes liability.
news.summary:
Havells India releases Q3 financials; announces Rs 4/share interim dividend.
Proposes new ESPS; records Rs 45.1 cr exceptional item from labor codes liability.

news.title: Havells India's board approves an interim dividend of ₹4 per share.
news.summary: Havells India's board approves an interim dividend of ₹4 per share.

news.title:
Havells India reported Q3 standalone revenue of ₹5,573 crore and consolidated revenue of ₹5,588 crore.
Q3 profit before tax was ₹405 crore standalone and ₹408 crore consolidated; interim dividend of ₹4/share approved.
news.summary:
Havells India reported Q3 standalone revenue of ₹5,573 crore and consolidated revenue of ₹5,588 crore.
Q3 profit before tax was ₹405 crore standalone and ₹408 crore consolidated; interim dividend of ₹4/share approved.

news.title:
Havells India fell 3.2%, hitting an intraday low of Rs 1,398.10 on BSE.
At 10:29 AM, shares traded 2.8% lower at Rs 1,404.9 following a Q3 profit miss.

news.title:

Havells India's Q3 results are highly anticipated with strong expectations for growth.
Analysts predict robust demand in consumer and industrial segments to boost revenue and profit.

news.title:
Havells India Ltd schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Jan 19, 2026, 5:45-6:30 PM IST.
Key management, including CMD Anil Rai Gupta, will discuss financial results for Q3 and nine months.

news.title:
FIIs turned net buyers of Indian consumer durables, investing $438M in December, reversing a 4-month sell-off.
Stocks like Asian Paints and Titan gained 11-25%, while Voltas and Havells fell 9-32%; valuations remain mixed.
news.summary:
FIIs turned net buyers of Indian consumer durables, investing $438M in December, reversing a 4-month sell-off.
Stocks like Asian Paints and Titan gained 11-25%, while Voltas and Havells fell 9-32%; valuations remain mixed.

news.title:
Havells India sets 23 Jan 2026 as record date for interim dividend.
Shareholders on this date will qualify for dividend declared on 19 Jan 2026.
news.summary:
